jobs.title: AI Application Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: 3+ years of software engineering
jobs.summary: A rapidly growing AI SaaS company in Berlin is seeking an AI Application Engineer to build next-generation AI-powered business applications using large language models, intelligent agents, and workflow automation. The role involves designing, developing, and deploying production-ready AI solutions that automate complex workflows and deliver business value.

skills.raw_text: Experience building and deploying production AI applications
Hands-on experience integrating and optimising LLM-based solutions
Strong understanding of modern application architecture and API development

jobs.title: AI Automation Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: driving force behind scaling efficiency, expert for Cosuno's automation stack, experience driving organizational change, ownership of modular automation platform
jobs.summary: Cosuno is looking for an AI Automation Engineer to design, build, and scale AI-driven workflow automations across the company by leveraging state-of-the-art LLMs, RAG, and orchestration tools (e.g. n8n, Vector DBs) rather than training custom models. The role involves close collaboration with the CEO & CTO to deliver a modular, reliable automation platform with measurable business impact.

skills.raw_text: connecting LLMs to proprietary data sources

jobs.title: AI Automation Engineer (F/M/X)
jobs.seniority_signal: production-oriented LLM workflows, Show ownership and initiative, production-ready automations
jobs.summary: Sparetech is hiring its first AI Automation Engineer to design, build, and scale AI-powered workflows and agents across the company. The role requires hands-on experience with LLM workflows, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and workflow automation to turn operational problems into reliable, production-ready automations.

jobs.title: AI Engineer (LLM) - Remote
jobs.seniority_signal: ownership mindset; experience integrating AI workflows into production systems
jobs.summary: Dexter Health is looking for an AI Engineer to build LLM-based workflows and AI-powered product features, integrating them into production systems. The role requires strong software engineering skills (especially Python), experience with AI output validation, and comfort operating in a fast-moving startup environment.

skills.raw_text: Strong software engineering skills, especially in Python or a comparable backend language
Experience building AI-powered product features or LLM-based workflows
Strong understanding of how to design, test, validate, and improve AI outputs
Experience integrating AI workflows into production systems
Experience with evaluation, testing, validation, or quality checks for AI-generated outputs
Serious experience using AI development tools such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, or similar as part of your daily workflow
Experience with frontend or fullstack product development
Experience with self-hosted LLMs, model serving, inference optimization, or similar systems
Experience with open-source LLMs and related deployment workflows
Experience improving latency, cost, quality, or reliability of AI systems
Experience with healthcare software, healthcare data, or regulated environments
Experience working with structured data extraction, documentation automation, voice workflows, or workflow automation
Knowledge of nursing homes or elderly care workflows

jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: 3+ years of professional backend software engineering experience
jobs.summary: IU is looking for an AI Engineer to help design and build LLM- and agent-powered backend services for Syntea, their AI-powered learning assistant. The role involves developing agentic pipelines, RAG, orchestration, and tool use at scale in production.

jobs.title: AI Engineer | AI SaaS Platform
jobs.seniority_signal: hands-on experience building software products with LLM integration, high ownership mentality, proven production mindset ("not just prototypes")
jobs.summary: Lufinity AI's client is hiring a hands-on AI Engineer to own AI features end-to-end — from idea to production — on a SaaS platform where AI is the core. The role centers on building RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, and model evaluation infrastructure in close collaboration with product and engineering.

skills.raw_text: RAG systems including document parsing, chunking and retrieval
infrastructure for evaluation, monitoring and continuous model improvement

jobs.title: AI Engineer (f/m/x)
jobs.seniority_signal: 3+ years of experience in Applied AI or Machine Learning in the industry
jobs.summary: Netconomy is hiring an AI Engineer to drive innovation and implement cutting-edge Generative AI solutions and intelligent agentic systems. The role involves designing end-to-end GenAI and RAG pipelines, developing agentic applications, and working with cloud AI offerings across hyperscalers.

skills.raw_text: agent development (e.g. LangGraph, Google Agent Development Kit (ADK), Agno)
Cloud AI offerings on one of the Hyperscalers (GCP, AWS or Azure)
Google Cloud AI/ML stack (e.g., Vertex AI, Gemini Models, Vector Search)
A/B testing expertise for AI models and applications

jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: production-quality code, proven practical/hands-on experience building production LLM applications
jobs.summary: Quantori is seeking a skilled AI/ML Engineer to design and implement evaluation strategies for AI agents within Databricks, contribute to MLOps workflows, and build/deploy production LLM applications. The role involves hands-on work with LLM agents, agentic workflows, RAG, and tool calling, alongside client demo delivery and AI solution refinement.

skills.raw_text: Strong Python engineering skills, including writing production-quality code and tests
Experience building and integrating REST APIs (e.g., FastAPI/Flask) for AI services
Practical experience with LLM agents / agentic workflows, including state management, tool/function calling, iterative execution, and output validation/guardrails
MLOps / LLMOps: experiment tracking, versioning, CI/CD for AI workflows, and deployment/monitoring basics
Experience designing evaluation and QA frameworks for LLM/agent outputs
Hands-on experience building production LLM applications and agents (RAG, multi-step reasoning, tool/function calling, MCP)
Experience with cheminformatics (e.g., molecular fingerprints, chemical descriptors, RDKit, molecular similarity search)
Experience working on healthcare or life sciences projects

jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: production-quality agentic systems, hands-on experience building LLM-powered agents, autonomous technical decisions with limited hand-holding
jobs.summary: TryHackMe is looking for an AI Engineer (EMEA, Remote) to design and build autonomous LLM-powered attacker and defender agents for a cybersecurity simulation platform, including prompt engineering, agent architecture, and adversary emulation integration.

skills.raw_text: LLM-powered agents — planning loops, tool use, memory, state management
Strong Python engineering; able to ship production-quality agentic systems
Prompt engineering for both red and blue team agent components
Ability to design prompts and agent architectures
LLMs to analyse an attack chain
Working familiarity with cybersecurity concepts — attack techniques, MITRE ATT&CK, network fundamentals
Experience with adversary emulation frameworks (MITRE CALDERA or similar)
Experience building event-driven systems that monitor and react to real-time state changes
Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (we provision VMs and networks dynamically per exercise)
Prior work in the cyber range, red team tooling, or security simulation space
Experience with multi-agent architectures where agents observe and react to each other

jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: Proven expertise in machine learning algorithms, model development, and deployment
jobs.summary: micro1 is seeking a contractor AI Engineer (EMEA, Remote) to develop and deploy advanced machine learning systems tackling real-world data challenges. The role sits at the intersection of software engineering, data science, and applied research, requiring hands-on expertise with ML pipelines, AWS, and Kubernetes.

skills.raw_text: machine learning algorithms, model development, and deployment
AWS cloud services for ML applications and data pipelines
Kubernetes for orchestrating containerized ML workloads
deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch

jobs.title: AI Engineering - Workingstudent
jobs.seniority_signal: Currently studying or recently completed a degree in computer science, AI, data science, engineering, mathematics, or a related technical field
jobs.summary: A working-student AI Engineer role at Cognee in Berlin, building small proof-of-concept applications using Cognee's open-source Python memory engine, exploring AI trends and agentic use cases, and translating technical experiments into developer-facing content and demos.

skills.raw_text: APIs, SDKs, notebooks, and developer tools
GitHub and basic software engineering workflows

jobs.title: Agentic AI Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: experienced... proven experience building AI-driven or agentic systems
jobs.summary: Mercanis is looking for an experienced Agentic AI Engineer to design, build, and optimize agentic AI systems that automate complex procurement workflows. The role involves working with Python, LangGraph, AWS, and LLM providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, and AWS Bedrock.

skills.raw_text: building AI-driven or agentic systems, preferably with LangGraph or similar frameworks
Large Language Models (LLMs) and their integration with external APIs or structured data
LLM providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, or AWS Bedrock
cloud-based deployment and scaling, ideally using AWS services
semantic search technologies (vector databases, embeddings, RAG systems)
measuring, evaluating, and optimizing AI system performance with clear metrics and benchmarking
observability and monitoring solutions for AI systems
MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for extending AI capabilities
agent-to-agent (A2A) communication patterns and multi-agent system architectures

skills.raw_text: Workflow automation and orchestration — agents, triggers, conditional logic

jobs.title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer (Freelance Lead AI Engineer / AI Architect)
jobs.seniority_signal: Lead/principal/architect — "Lead AI Engineer / AI Architect", "experienced Lead AI Engineer/Architect"
